note: Sizes are uncompressed JS asset sizes from the latest available Next build manifest in the working tree.

routes.redline: Landing is too heavy for a chat-first front door.
Dashboard is heavy and should not be the primary user entry.
Chat is nearly as heavy as the dashboard and is nested in dashboard chrome.
Report route is the heaviest audited app route.
Vedic evidence room carries the same heavy shared chunks.
KP evidence room carries the same heavy shared chunks.
Jaimini evidence room carries the same heavy shared chunks.
Numerology evidence room carries the same heavy shared chunks.
Signature is lighter than other dashboard routes but still not lightweight.
Kundli creation sits inside heavy dashboard payload.
Redeem pass is lighter but still dashboard-bound.
